response.justification: Candidate is technically strong with solid distributed systems and infrastructure experience, but has a critical gap in the minimum requirement of 8 years C++ programming (only ~6 months evident at National Instruments). Resume also lacks evidence of formal technical leadership with team mentoring, which is central to the role. Could be worth reconsidering if the company is flexible on C++ specificity and willing to invest in leadership development.
strengths: Extensive distributed systems experience, including platforms handling millions of requests per second at Dunnhumby
Strong testing and software craftsmanship culture (TDD, CI/CD expertise, created testing frameworks and courses)
Broad infrastructure and DevOps knowledge (Kubernetes, Docker, AWS CDK, GitLab setup, CI/deploy servers)
concerns: Only ~6 months of explicit C++ experience versus the required 8 years—a critical minimum qualification gap
No evidence of formal technical leadership role mentoring cloud or DevOps engineers; roles are primarily individual-contributor focused despite senior titles
Limited cloud compute platform domain specialization; experience is broad but lacks deep focus on compute technologies and hardware architecture
